title: Os' Colorful Leaves
description: Add color and depth to your leaves! Pair with your favorite bushy leaves pack for more detail. Get the full versions on Patreon!
body:
[![FastClient Ad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1dc21fae33dabdbc4a6109168110e69b42bf6f7.png)](https://fastclient.net/Oslypsis)

# What Does This Pack Do?

This pack aesthetically changes the leaf blocks to have variations of color within their leaves. It adds subtle depth and color, and can be paired with your favorite bushy leaf packs, such as the one demonstrated here from VanillaTweaks. Now includes the pale oak leaves, and leaf litter! Leaf litter is available separately, too.

[Colorful Leaves Plus (on Patreon for $3)](https://www.patreon.com/Oslypsis/shop/os-colorful-leaves-plus-1249303?source=storefront) adds on to the basic version with new colorful variations for all leaf blocks, and adds a few new colorful variations for leaf litter, pink petals, and wildflowers. A bushy leaves addon version is now available for free, alongside the purchase of the basic version.

![Picture of one of the textures included in this pack](https://i.imgur.com/7MQYhpw.gif)

[![Get 25% off your first month with BisectHosting using promo code oslypsis](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/a68298ac-ecfb-4f1b-9057-5081d638948d.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/oslypsis)

# Usage Rights
Using/modifying for personal use is allowed.

Use (even if modified) for monetized videos must include a link in the description back to this page.

Please ask before using my content in your mods/packs/etc. Do not redistribute.

Using this pack as a template to make your own textures that work the same way in game as mine do is allowed and encouraged. Please note that I've changed some of the names of the files from their vanilla counterparts - you will need to keep these names when changing out the textures or the files will not be able to find the textures.
